name: Gia
reason: Chef Sam Tran’s innovative tasting menus tell stories of Vietnamese regions through seasonal local ingredients and sophisticated techniques.

name: Chả Cá Thăng Long
reason: Specializing in Chả Cá, a dish so legendary it has its own street in the Old Quarter. This spot is recognized for consistency and exceptional value.

name: Nén Danang
reason: A leader in sustainable gastronomy, using hyper-local ingredients and traditional fermentation to create dishes that are as thoughtful as they are delicious.

name: Anan Saigon
reason: Located in a traditional wet market, Chef Peter Cuong Franklin transforms street food classics like Pho and Banh Mi into high-end culinary experiences.
